title: Bigram drill: th, in, er, an, re
description: Most frequent English letter pairs — train them as single motions
text: th th th in in in er er er an an an re re re the then this that with which when where there their other under under after father mother
tips: Type each pair as ONE motion, not two separate keys
If your fingers fight a bigram, isolate and drill it 10 times

character_tips.anna: Bigrams are the building blocks of speed. Make each pair feel like one keystroke.
character_tips.maxim: Pros don't think in letters — they think in pairs and clusters.
character_tips.knopych: Combo moves! 🥋 Two keys, ONE motion!
character_tips.klavochka: Like couples dancing, my dear 💑 In step together!
